title: fagara alata var. beecheyana
intro: Fagara alata var. beecheyana, also known as the Chinese pepper, is a variety of the Fagara alata plant, a type of evergreen shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Fagara alata var. beecheyana include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's berries or leaves can be made into a tea, tincture, or powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
